evals.prompt: I need to change the author of every commit in my feature branch to my new name 'Alex Smith' and email 'alex.smith@company.com'
evals.expected_output: Clones repo to /tmp/, runs git filter-branch with new author/committer name and email, verifies with git log, cleans up filter-branch artifacts, informs user rewritten repo is at /tmp/<repo>-rewrite

evals.prompt: update all commits in this repo to use my new email alex@newdomain.com, keep the author name as is
evals.expected_output: Extracts current author name from existing commits, rewrites all commits with new email while preserving author name, verifies changes, cleans up backup refs

evals.prompt: fix attribution across my main branch, all commits should show author as 'Taylor' and email 'taylor@dev.io'
evals.expected_output: Checks out main branch, rewrites all commit authors and committers to specified name/email, verifies rewrite, provides instructions for applying changes to original repo if requested
